positive: A vibrant, stylized geometric illustration of a celestial journey. The main subject is a stylized astronaut exploring a nebula formed by crystalline, flowing cosmic dust. Incorporate abstract geometric elements like sharp crystalline formations, interconnected orbital rings, and swirling gaseous nebulae. The style should be a blend of Art Deco aesthetics and modern vector illustration, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast. Composition must be centralized, perfectly balanced, and highly scalable for apparel printing. Use a limited, vibrant color palette of deep indigo, electric teal, shimmering silver, and bright violet. Lighting should be dramatic and otherworldly, giving the appearance of being illuminated by distant starlight. The entire image must have a clean, seamless, high-resolution look, suitable for textile repeat patterns.
negative: blur, lowres, artifact, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, grainy, jpeg artifacts, blurry, poorly drawn, grayscale, realistic photography
